query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM estrategias e LEFT JOIN processos p ON e.processoId = p.id WHERE p.id IS NULL) as estrategias_orfas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documentos d LEFT JOIN clientes c ON d.clienteId = c.id WHERE c.id IS NULL) as docs_orfaos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos WHERE numeroCnj LIKE 'SEM_%') as cnj_invalidos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos p LEFT JOIN estrategias e ON p.id = e.processoId WHERE e.id IS NULL) as processos_sem_estrategia,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos p LEFT JOIN movimentacoes_financeiras mf ON p.id = mf.processoId WHERE mf.id IS NULL) as processos_sem_financeiro,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prazos_processuais) as total_prazos;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM estrategias e LEFT JOIN processos p ON e.processoId = p.id WHERE p.id IS NULL) as estrategias_orfas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documentos d LEFT JOIN clientes c ON d.clienteId = c.id WHERE c.id IS NULL) as docs_orfaos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos WHERE numeroCnj LIKE 'SEM_%') as cnj_invalidos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos p LEFT JOIN estrategias e ON p.id = e.processoId WHERE e.id IS NULL) as processos_sem_estrategia,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos p LEFT JOIN movimentacoes_financeiras mf ON p.id = mf.processoId WHERE mf.id IS NULL) as processos_sem_financeiro,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prazos_processuais) as total_prazos;
